    def run_modal(args, timeout=300, check=True):
        env = os.environ.copy()
        env["MODAL_ENVIRONMENT"] = MODAL_ENV
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["modal"] + args,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=timeout,
            env=env,
        )
